authoringRequirements: Author the enforcement contract outside data/concepts while the concept remains rejected.
Keep the contract inside the governance domain and define enforcement without collapsing it into duty or responsibility.
Bind the contract to one deterministic identity role before any promotion review begins.
testRequirements: Compare enforcement against duty and responsibility through the live-kernel overlap gate.
Require a passing overlap report with no conflict, duplicate, or compression result.
Freeze any new enforcement regression pair in the overlap snapshot before live promotion review.
promotionRequirements: Keep enforcement in the rejection registry until overlap admission returns overlap_scan_passed against the live kernel.
Require zero unapproved drift in the global overlap snapshot before changing concept-admission-state.json.
Promote enforcement to live only in the same scoped change that adds a reviewed concept packet and removes the rejection record.

authoringRequirements: Author the obligation contract outside data/concepts while the concept remains rejected.
Keep the contract inside the governance domain and define obligation as a pre-duty binding condition without redefining duty or responsibility.
Bind the contract to one deterministic identity role before any promotion review begins.
testRequirements: Compare obligation against duty and responsibility through the live-kernel overlap gate.
Require boundary proof wherever the live-kernel overlap result demands it.
Freeze any new obligation regression pair in the overlap snapshot before live promotion review.
promotionRequirements: Keep obligation in the rejection registry until overlap admission returns overlap_scan_passed against the live kernel.
Require zero unapproved drift in the global overlap snapshot before changing concept-admission-state.json.
Promote obligation to live only in the same scoped change that adds a reviewed concept packet and removes the rejection record.
